title: indigofera dissitiflora var. dissitiflora
intro: Indigofera dissitiflora var. dissitiflora is a species of plant in the pea family, commonly known as a legume, which is native to India and Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which may help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Indigofera dissitiflora var. dissitiflora is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
